children.heading: Servicemember
children.label: 1 Servicemember
children.text: The term “servicemember” means a member of the uniformed services, as that term is defined in .section 101(a)(5) of title 10

children.label: i
children.text: active duty, as defined in , andsection 101(d)(1) of title 10

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of a member of the National Guard, includes service under a call to active service authorized by the President or the Secretary of Defense for a period of more than 30 consecutive days under for purposes of responding to a national emergency declared by the President and supported by Federal funds;section 502(f) of title 32

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a servicemember who is a commissioned officer of the Public Health Service or the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, active service; and

children.label: C
children.text: any period during which a servicemember is absent from duty on account of sickness, wounds, leave, or other lawful cause.

children.heading: Period of military service
children.label: 3 Period of military service
children.text: The term “period of military service” means the period beginning on the date on which a servicemember enters military service and ending on the date on which the servicemember is released from military service or dies while in military service.

children.label: B
children.text: the servicemember’s child (as defined in ); orsection 101(4) of title 38

children.label: C
children.text: an individual for whom the servicemember provided more than one-half of the individual’s support for 180 days immediately preceding an application for relief under this chapter.

children.heading: Court
children.label: 5 Court
children.text: The term “court” means a court or an administrative agency of the United States or of any State (including any political subdivision of a State), whether or not a court or administrative agency of record.

children.label: A
children.text: a commonwealth, territory, or possession of the United States; and

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to a member of the armed forces, has the meaning given that term in ;section 101(a)(9) of title 10

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to a commissioned officer of the Public Health Service, means the Secretary of Health and Human Services; and

children.label: C
children.text: with respect to a commissioned officer of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, means the Secretary of Commerce.

children.heading: Motor vehicle
children.label: 8 Motor vehicle
children.text: The term “motor vehicle” has the meaning given that term in .section 30102(a)(6) of title 491See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Judgment
children.label: 9 Judgment
children.text: The term “judgment” means any judgment, decree, order, or ruling, final or temporary.
